messages.content: Ein Gebäude wird so geplant, dass sich gleichzeitig 120 Personen darin aufhalten können. Es ist davon auszugehen, dass sich gleich viele Männer wie Frauen im Gebäude befinden und die Toiletten kontinuierlich benutzt werden. Wie viele weibliche Sitztoiletten, männliche Sitztoiletten und Urinalstände?

In response to your inquiry about the number of toilets required for a building accommodating 120 people, with an equal distribution of men and women, the relevant regulations can be found in the OIB Guidelines, particularly OIB-RL 3 (Hygiene, Health, and Environmental Protection) and OIB-RL 4 (Safety in Use and Accessibility). According to these guidelines, the number of sanitary facilities must be proportionate to the number of occupants. For a mixed-gender occupancy of 120 people, a common standard suggests providing at least one toilet for every 10 persons. Therefore, for 60 women, a minimum of 6 female toilets should be provided, while for 60 men, at least 6 male toilets are necessary. Additionally, it is recommended to include urinal stands for men, typically at a ratio of 1 urinal for every 5 male occupants, leading to a suggestion of at least 12 urinal stands. This setup ensures continuous availability and accessibility of sanitary facilities, adhering to the hygiene and safety standards outlined in the OIB guidelines.
